title: Grade Checker
description:
Write a program that sets score = 85. Use if/elif/else to print:
- 'Grade: A' if score >= 90
- 'Grade: B' if score >= 80
- Otherwise, 'Grade: C'
starter_code: # Set your score and print the grade

code_requirements.description: Uses an 'if' statement for conditional logic
code_requirements.fail_message: Use an 'if' statement to check the score condition instead of hardcoding the output.

code_requirements.description: Uses an 'elif' statement for the second condition
code_requirements.fail_message: Use 'elif' for the second condition (score >= 80) to practice chaining conditions.

hints: Start by creating a variable: score = 85
Use if score >= 90: first, then elif score >= 80:, then else:
Make sure the print statements are indented correctly under each condition
